repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.caching: cache patterns aside/through/behind, invalidation strategies, stampede and thundering-herd protection, TTL with jitter, multi-layer caching, negative caching
write a UVM testbench for the FSM

retrieval_query: cache aside write through write behind invalidation stampede thundering herd ttl jitter cache key multi layer cdn negative caching coherence stale while revalidate

validation_smoke.name: code.caching L3 validation smoke
signals: hit rate meets target with bounded origin load
writes reflected in reads within the staleness bound
single-flight lock holds origin to one recompute per expiry
distinct cache key count stays within capacity

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.caching diagnosis smoke
signals: synchronized TTL expiry causing an origin load spike
stale reads after write from a missed invalidation path
low hit rate from unbounded key cardinality
cache penetration from uncached negative lookups
additive staleness across uncoordinated cache layers
